questions.subject: Structural Analysis
questions.stem: A fixed beam of span $6\,\text{m}$ carries a central point load $40\,\text{kN}$. The magnitude of the fixed-end moment is _____ kNÂ·m.
questions.solution:
**Concept.** Fixed-end moment for a central point load $=\dfrac{WL}{8}$.

**Working.**
$$M=\dfrac{40\times 6}{8}=30.$$

**Answer.** $30\,\text{kNÂ·m}$

questions.subject: Structural Analysis
questions.stem: A fixed beam of span $4\,\text{m}$ carries a central point load $60\,\text{kN}$. The magnitude of the fixed-end moment is _____ kNÂ·m.
questions.solution:
**Concept.** Fixed-end moment for a central point load $=\dfrac{WL}{8}$.

**Working.**
$$M=\dfrac{60\times 4}{8}=30.$$

**Answer.** $30\,\text{kNÂ·m}$

questions.subject: Structural Analysis
questions.stem: A fixed beam of span $6\,\text{m}$ carries a UDL of $20\,\text{kN/m}$. The magnitude of the support (fixed-end) moment is _____ kNÂ·m.

questions.stem: A fixed beam of span $8\,\text{m}$ carries a UDL of $12\,\text{kN/m}$. The magnitude of the support (fixed-end) moment is _____ kNÂ·m.

questions.subject: Structural Analysis
questions.stem: A single-bay single-storey portal frame with both column bases fixed is statically indeterminate to degree
questions.solution:
**Concept.** Closed frame indeterminacy $D_s = 3$ for a single fixed-base portal (3 redundants).

**Working.**
$D_s=3$.

**Answer.** $3$

questions.subject: Structural Analysis
questions.stem: Kinematic indeterminacy (degrees of freedom) of a propped cantilever beam (axially rigid) is
questions.solution:
**Concept.** Propped cantilever: rotation at the propped end is the only unknown DOF (axial ignored).

**Working.**
$D_k=1$.

**Answer.** $1$

questions.subject: Structural Analysis
questions.stem: In the moment-distribution method, the carry-over factor for a prismatic member (far end fixed) is

questions.subject: Structural Analysis
questions.stem: The rotational stiffness $\left(\tfrac{4EI}{L}\right)$ of a prismatic member with $EI = 8000\,\text{kNÂ·m}^2$ and $L = 4\,\text{m}$ is _____ kNÂ·m/rad.

questions.subject: Structural Analysis
questions.stem: The ordinate of the influence line for the reaction at support $A$ of a simply supported beam, directly under $A$, equals
questions.solution:
**Concept.** ILD for a reaction has unit ordinate under that support.

**Working.**
Ordinate $=1$.

**Answer.** $1$

questions.subject: Structural Analysis
questions.stem: Which of the following are force (flexibility) methods of structural analysis?
questions.solution:
**Concept.** Consistent deformation & column analogy are force methods; slope-deflection & moment-distribution are displacement methods.

**Working.**
Options 1 and 2.

**Answer.** Consistent deformation & column analogy

questions.subject: Structural Analysis
questions.stem: Castigliano's second theorem is used to determine
questions.solution:
**Concept.** $\delta=\partial U/\partial P$ gives deflection.

**Working.**
Deflections.

**Answer.** Deflections
